mapper.sql: select tss.ter_sn, tss.sensor_type, tss.data, tss.updated_time, tss.sensor_status, tss.sensor_config, tss.module_number, ti.upc, ti.gateway, bi.id as building_id, bi.name as building_name, bfi.floor_name, tbpi.created_time, bpi.point_name, bpi.block, bpi.zone, bpi.zone_sub from ter_sensor_status tss left join ter_info ti on (ti.sn = tss.ter_sn) left join ter_building_point_info tbpi on (tss.ter_sn = tbpi.ter_sn) left join building_point_info bpi on (tbpi.point_id = bpi.id) left join building_floor_info bfi on (bpi.floor_id = bfi.id) left join building_info bi on (bpi.building_id = bi.id) inner join sys_dept d on (bi.dept_id = d.dept_id)
mapper.select: select bi.id as building_id, bfi.id as floor_id, tss.ter_sn, tss.sensor_type, tss.data, tss.updated_time, tss.sensor_status,tss.module_number, bfi.floor_name, bi.name as building_name from ter_sensor_status tss left join ter_building_point_info tbpi on (tss.ter_sn = tbpi.ter_sn) left join building_point_info bpi on (tbpi.point_id = bpi.id) left join building_floor_info bfi on (bpi.floor_id = bfi.id) left join building_info bi on (bpi.building_id = bi.id) where tss.deal_flag='0' and tss.sensor_status='alarm' and tss.ter_sn = #{terSn} and tss.sensor_type = #{sensorType}
mapper.insert: insert into ter_light_status (id, ter_sn, status) values (#{id}, #{terSn}, #{status})

insert into ter_sensor_status
ter_sn, sensor_type, module_number, data, updated_time, sensor_status, sensor_config,
#{terSn}, #{sensorType}, #{moduleNumber}, #{data}, #{updatedTime}, #{sensorStatus}, #{sensorConfig},
mapper.update:
update ter_sensor_status
sensor_type = #{sensorType}, data = #{data}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, sensor_status = #{sensorStatus},
sensor_config = CONCAT(SUBSTRING(sensor_config, 1, LENGTH(sensor_config) - 2), SUBSTRING(#{sensorConfig}, LENGTH(#{sensorConfig}) - 1, LENGTH(#{sensorConfig}))),
sensor_config = #{sensorConfig},
deal_flag = #{dealFlag},
and ter_sn = #{terSn} and sensor_type = #{sensorType}
and ter_sn in
#{terSn}

insert into ter_sensor_status (ter_sn, sensor_type, module_number, data, updated_time, sensor_status) values (#{terSn}, #{sensorType}, #{moduleNumber}, #{data}, #{updatedTime}, #{sensorStatus}) ON DUPLICATE key update sensor_type = values(sensor_type), module_number = values(module_number), data = values(data), updated_time = values(updated_time), sensor_status = values(sensor_status), deal_flag = values(deal_flag)
mapper.delete:
delete from ter_sensor_status where ter_sn in
#{terSn}
